icu_trial_summary: An early restrictive strategy prioritizing vasopressors did not significantly reduce 90-day mortality compared with a liberal fluid strategy. Serious adverse events were similar between groups.
historical_fact: On July 20, 1969, Apollo 11 landed on the Moon and Neil Armstrong became the first person to walk on its surface.
